tagline: Your stuff, its story, your score.

designSystem.fontFamily: -apple-system, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
designSystem.style: Marketplace / Directory with nature-inspired organic shapes, sustainable green accents, rounded flowing elements, and earthy natural textures. Gamified eco-tracking with score cards, progress bars, and achievement badges.

features: Item scanning with camera overlay and animated scan line
Environmental footprint scoring with letter grades
Legacy action prompts with point rewards
Reclaim Challenges with deadlines and progress
